dimensions.name: correctness
dimensions.evidence: `go test ./internal/cli/...`, `bun test adapters/pi/furrow.test.ts`, `tests/integration/test-blocker-coverage.sh`, and `tests/integration/test-blocker-parity.sh` all passed, and a fresh `go run ./cmd/furrow row status --json` emitted canonical blocker objects with `code/category/severity/message/remediation_hint/confirmation_path` on both `data.blockers` and `data.row.gates.pending_blockers`.

dimensions.name: test-coverage
dimensions.evidence: New branching helpers `candidateTaxonomyPaths()` and `moduleSourceRoot()` in `internal/cli/blocker_envelope.go` are not directly exercised for their env-override/source-root fallback branches; existing tests cover `Lookup`/`Applies` but not those new resolution paths.

dimensions.name: spec-compliance
dimensions.evidence: `schemas/blocker-taxonomy.yaml` now contains 40 codes across the required categories, preserves the locked 11 legacy codes via `TestBlockerTaxonomyBackwardCompat11`, the schema enforces the canonical fields/enums, and the docs now cite the taxonomy as canonical instead of duplicating the registry.

dimensions.name: unplanned-changes
dimensions.evidence: All files changed by commit `5f4fd59ff4826dca0882f7bbc2047303356781bc` are within the deliverable’s declared `file_ownership` globs (`adapters/pi/furrow.ts`, `docs/...pi-step-ceremony...md`, `internal/cli/{blocker_envelope.go,blocker_envelope_test.go,row_semantics.go,row_workflow.go}`, `schemas/blocker-taxonomy.yaml`).

dimensions.name: code-quality
dimensions.evidence: The change follows project conventions and the relevant verification suite is green (`go test ./internal/cli/...`, Bun adapter tests, and both blocker integration scripts), with no adapter-specific fields introduced into the canonical taxonomy.
